negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited repo set has no Reth async fee calculation that tiers Image Call Phase 2 executor fees by delivered output dimensions.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs has no calculate_image_fees_phase2 or image escrow helper.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs explicitly rejects image/audio/video/FHE async commitment metadata without fee parity.

ritual-revm-internal/crates/precompile/src/image_call.rs documents per-pixel image pricing and computes precompile gas from input/output byte lengths, but it is not the Reth async settlement fee path and does not tier fees by delivered image dimensions for builder/verifier parity.

notes: A revm precompile exists, but the consensus async fee/builder/verifier pricing path is absent.
rationale: The primary diff adds image fee constants and helpers, uses the highest tier for escrow lockup, routes Phase 1 calculate_async_fees through calculate_image_fees_phase1, routes Image Phase 2 through calculate_image_fees_phase2, and adds dimension extraction in both payload building and block verification. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Image Call Phase 1 pricing should use a constant registration-style fee plus normal commitment and inclusion fees, while Phase 2 pricing should calculate only an executor fee from output width * height using the configured image resolution tiers; malformed or too-short Phase 2 image delivery data should cause builder settlement creation to skip and verifier settlement validation to fail.
suggested_falsification_tests: Assert calculate_async_fees(0x0818, input_len, None) returns the image Phase 1 fee shape, image_escrow_lockup equals the highest tier fee, and calculate_image_fees_phase2 returns tier 0/1/2/3 fees at representative dimensions. Then build/verify Phase 2 image settlements with valid and truncated delivery_result bytes and assert valid dimensions are priced by tier while truncated data is skipped by the builder or rejected by the verifier.
summary: Image Call dimension-tiered async fees are not ported.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build/verify Image Call Phase 2 settlements with representative width/height tiers; the current port has no image fee function and cannot price them by output dimensions.
title: Image Call fees are tiered by output dimensions
